name: AnimationBehavior
summary: Animation behavior as applied by the TimeLiner simulation engine.

enum_values.name: Scale
enum_values.summary: The animation duration is scaled to be same as task duration.

enum_values.name: Start
enum_values.summary: The animation starts when the task starts. The animation may be clipped if the task finishes before animation does.

enum_values.name: End
enum_values.summary: The animation starts so that it ends when the task ends. The animation start is clipped (starts part way through) if the animation needs to start before task does.
